title: Remove an unsupported transport outcome

messages.text: No transport pattern had been drawn and the team had not agreed to use it.

pendingUserMessage: Daniel asks what could go wrong if Will's pattern is inaccurate.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: Will drew the pattern perfectly, and the team arrived home without incident. Daniel admitted the method was safe.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Answer Daniel's risk question without drawing the pattern or resolving transport.
requiredBeats: The response discusses uncertainty or consequences of an inaccurate pattern.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Draw the pattern, transport the team, or establish that the method is safe.
